description.content:
Chat completions endpoint for Inflection hosted models.

⚠️ This endpoint is under active development to enable all Inflection model and config types.

response.name: Returns either the full response (`application/json`) or streams multiple `ChatCompletionStreamResponse` objects via `text/event-stream`. Each event in the stream is a JSON object matching the ChatCompletionStreamResponse schema, and each event is prefixed by `data:` (typical for Server-Sent Events).

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

Get attribute scores for the most recent assistant message in a chat completions style request.

⚠️ Experimental endpoint for evaluating message attributes.

response.name:
Returns attribute scores for the final assistant message. If no attributes are provided, a set of default attributes is used.

Scores are provided in JSON format as `{"AttributeName": {"score": float, "positive": bool}, ...}` in the first Choice message content.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

Embeddings endpoint for Inflection hosted models.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

Get all available configs (for use in the chat completion endpoint `model` field) for an organization.

Returns each config's `name` (aka `model`), `alias` (for UI display), `default_parameters`, and `description`.

response.name: List of configs available for the organization

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

Chat completions compatible endpoint for legacy Inflection models.

Provides a compatibility chat completions endpoint to talk with any Inflection model.

response.name: Returns either the full response (`application/json`) or streams multiple `ChatCompletionStreamResponse` objects via `text/event-stream`. Note: The response format matches OpenAI's schema but only includes the core fields. Advanced features like logprobs, etc. are not supported.
